instruction: 帮我把漏斗数据整理到分析文档里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '阶段'
ws['B1'] = '数量'
ws['C1'] = '转化率(%)'
ws['A2'] = '展示曝光'
ws['B2'] = 100000
ws['C2'] = 100
ws['A3'] = '点击浏览'
ws['B3'] = 12500
ws['C3'] = 12.5
ws['A4'] = '加入购物车'
ws['B4'] = 3200
ws['C4'] = 25.6
ws['A5'] = '提交订单'
ws['B5'] = 1850
ws['C5'] = 57.8
ws['A6'] = '完成支付'
ws['B6'] = 1620
ws['C6'] = 87.6
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/funnel_data.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把漏斗数据整理到分析文档里
从/home/user/Desktop/funnel_data.xlsx中计算整体支付转化率（1620/100000），追加到/home/user/Desktop/funnel_summary.txt末尾：'整体漏斗转化率：1.62%（10万曝光，1620人支付）'，保存

include: 整体漏斗转化率：1.62%（10万曝光，1620人支付）
